title: Be Reborn! The Astronomical Legend
overview: The Astronomy Club is in danger of shutting down unless they get more members.

title: Crybaby Hakata's Stunning Transformation
overview: Kanamori has been pushed too far and has mentally broken. Kyoko sets up a magical girl battle to snap her out of it.

title: From Confetti Candy With Love
overview: A student from another school has “infiltrated” the club, Kyouko is sure she is an alien, but she might be something more surprising.

title: Kokuin 2012
overview: Todayama Izumiko reason for visiting her sister is vague, but the group doesn’t care. With the help of Oomari-sensei, she might become the first outsider to join the club.

title: This is the Miracle of the Astronomical Club! The Maid is Alightened!
overview: Her name is Elizabeth Margaret and she has come for what is rightfully hers.

title: Aim for the Stars! The Girl Who Dreams of Love
overview: Once again the Astronomy Club is on the verge of being shut down. Ooba has invited Iseda out to experience the club once again.

title: Viva-ten
overview: Kyouko hasn’t abandoned her goal of starting a band, but with five vocalists they will need more band mates. But trouble seems to be brewing with Itsuki’s constant headaches.

title: TTR Astronomical Club Special Investigation Team: Astronomical Special Endless Herbs (Pheremone)
overview: The pheromones are strong with Itsuki. When his true personality is released his power is unmatched and almost unstoppable.

title: The Astronomical Club's Great Victory! Face Tomorrow, Ready Go!!
overview: Kyouko has pushed Itsuki to the limit and is forced to show them all his true ultimate power.

title: Beautiful Dreamers
overview: The Agonizing Astronomy Club is getting ready for the school fair.
